title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 10 July 2026

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 10 July 2026
summary:
Main
The Indian recycling market, which remained soft during the previous week, weakened further this week amid continued subdued buying interest. Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian recycling market, which remained soft during the previous week,
weakened further this week amid continued subdued buying interest. The limited availability of suitable tonnage has restricted market activity, while the
arrival of the monsoon season is expected to add further pressure in the near term.
